Container.Name: immich-gpt
Container.Overview:
AI-first metadata enrichment and organisation for Immich.
Immich GPT connects to your existing Immich photo server, classifies every asset with an AI vision model (OpenAI, Ollama, or OpenRouter), and lets you review and write AI-generated descriptions, tags, and album assignments back to Immich — all from a clean web UI.
Multi-user: each person manages their own Immich connection, AI providers, buckets, and assets. An admin account is created automatically on first start.
Single-container — no Redis, no separate worker process required. All jobs run in-process using a lightweight thread pool.
Container.Requires: A running Immich instance reachable from this container. An OpenAI API key OR a locally-running Ollama instance.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Immich GPT web interface. Change Host port only; keep container port at 8000.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database. All user accounts, settings, job history, and AI suggestions are stored here. Back this up.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Email address for the admin account created automatically on first startup. You will use this to log in for the first time.

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Initial password for the admin account. You will be forced to change it on first login. Use a temporary value here.

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username for the auto-created admin account.

Config.Name: Immich URL
Config.Description: Full URL of your Immich server (optional — can be set per-user in the UI after login). Must be reachable from inside Docker. Example: http://192.168.1.100:2283

Config.Name: Immich API Key
Config.Description: Immich API key (optional — can be set per-user in the UI after login). Create one in Immich → Account Settings → API Keys.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o vision classification (optional — configure providers per-user in the UI). Leave blank if using Ollama or OpenRouter.

Config.Name: OpenAI Model
Config.Description: Default OpenAI model. Only used when OPENAI_API_KEY is set and no provider is configured in the UI. gpt-4o-mini is cheaper; gpt-4o is more accurate.

Config.Name: Secure Cookie (HTTPS)
Config.Description: Set to true if you access Immich GPT over HTTPS (e.g. via a reverse proxy with SSL). Required for internet-exposed deployments. Leave false for LAN-only HTTP.

Config.Name: Worker Threads
Config.Description: Number of background job threads (sync + classification). 2 is enough for most home servers. Increase if you have many assets and a fast AI provider.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Leave blank to use the built-in thread-pool worker (recommended for Unraid). Set to redis://host:6379/0 only if you run a separate Redis container and want distributed workers.
